hero.heading: North Bay comfort, done right since 1986
hero.subheading: A local, family-run team handling plumbing, heating, cooling and water heaters across Sonoma and Marin — with an honest repair-first promise and a 4.9-star reputation built over 40 years.

about.heading: About John Owens Services
body: John Owens Services has been a local, family-run fixture in the North Bay since 1986. Over 40 years the team has grown to three offices — Santa Rosa, Petaluma and San Rafael — while keeping the same straightforward promise: fix what can be fixed, and only recommend a replacement when it truly makes sense.

That repair-first philosophy, backed by five trade licenses covering plumbing, radiant heating, HVAC, electrical and general building, is why homeowners across Sonoma and Marin keep calling back. The work spans everyday plumbing and drain cleaning to water heaters, furnaces, heat pumps and indoor air quality — including specialty service for the area’s classic Eichler homes.

services.title: Plumbing repair & installation
services.description: Toilets, faucets, fixtures, pipes and disposals repaired or replaced — fast, clean, and done right the first time.

services.title: Sewer & drain cleaning
services.description: Rooter service, clog clearing and descaling to get stubborn drains and main lines flowing freely again.

services.title: Leak detection
services.description: Pinpoint water, gas and slab leaks before they cause damage — then fix them right.

services.title: Heating & furnaces
services.description: Repair and installation of furnaces, hydronic systems and boilers to keep your home warm through North Bay winters.

services.title: Air conditioning & heat pumps
services.description: AC repair, maintenance and installs, plus efficient heat pumps and ductless mini-splits for year-round comfort.

services.title: Water heaters
services.description: Standard, tankless, heat-pump and commercial water heaters — repaired same-day or replaced with the right fit.

items.title: John Owens Services, Inc. opened its doors
items.body: John Owens Services has been a local, family-run fixture in the North Bay since 1986

items.quote: John Owens Services were so responsive and Keith was so helpful. Prompt, courteous, knowledgeable, efficient. The installation team listened to us when we had questions.
items.author: North Bay homeowner

items.quote: I highly recommend Max — he was knowledgeable and neat and tried the less expensive option first. He explained every step of the way, getting approval before moving forward when he had to use an alternate solution.
items.author: Santa Rosa customer

items.quote: I used John Owens Services to replace my water heater at my Petaluma home. Two technicians named Will and Will came out the same day my old water heater died and replaced it in no time. Fast, efficient, and professional.
items.author: Petaluma customer

items.a: You'll find us at 3471 Regional Pkwy Ste C.
Mon – Fri: 7:30 AM – 5:30 PM; Sat – Sun: By appointment.
We proudly serve Santa Rosa, CA and the surrounding community.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
items.a: Call us at +17072032517 — we're glad to help.
